title: oxalis stolonifera
intro: Oxalis stolonifera, also known as the creeping woodsorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the wood sorrel family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it beneficial in treating wounds, infections, and even certain types of cancer. The plant is also known for its potential health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Oxalis stolonifera can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
